meaning: n.基瓦尼俱乐部(美国工商业人士的一个俱乐部)
examples: And don't forget non-commercial organizations like Rotary or Kiwanis.
"I said," I'm sorry, I forgot I have to pick up something here for my Kiwanis speech next week.
A member of Kiwanis International, a service organization made up of business and professional people, founded in 95.
Emily Lang is being honored as a Champion of Change for her Kiwanis International service.
Sheena Curley is being honored as a Champion of Change for her service to Kiwanis International.
